## Summary
- Describe what changed in this repository.
- State whether the change affects the repository instance, the reusable artifact library, or both.

## Validation
- Describe how you ran `python scripts/validate_governance_artifacts.py` locally.
- Mention any manual checks needed beyond the deterministic validator.

## Impact
- Note whether downstream repositories may need to re-instantiate or review any reusable artifact.
- Mention any affected paths under `artifacts/`.

## Checklist
- [ ] I edited the correct layer: repository instance or reusable artifact library.
- [ ] I preserved or updated `## Source Attribution` where required.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate_governance_artifacts.py`.
